entities.name: Knowledge Write Protection
entities.context: Safety feature that enforces read-only access to baseline strategy, requiring human approval for updates

entities.name: Non-Prescriptive Analysis
entities.context: Analytical approach that describes patterns without dictating decisions, flags tensions without resolving them

entities.name: baseline strategy
entities.context: Foundational strategy document maintained as read-only by the system

relationships.context: Reads baseline strategy as read-only, proposes updates based on evolution
Both are safety features designed to preserve human agency in the knowledge system
